title: Everbuild Stick2 General Purpose Superglue – Industrial Grade – High Strength – Rapid Setting – Clear – 20g (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

MULTIPLE APPLICATIONS - Perfect for use on non-porous surfaces like metals, PVCu, glass and most plastics. Will also bond porous surfaces like wood but for these types of applications, we recommend either D4 wood adhesive for wood or high viscosity super glue.
RAPID SETTING – Sets in just 10 to 15 seconds for an instant bond between your non-porous materials.
SOLVENT-FREE – Utilises advanced cyanoacrylate technology for solvent-free bonds that are safer to use in confined spaces.
DELIVERS AN INVISIBLE BOND – Fills gaps up to 0.1mm for excellent adhesion and dries to a clear finish for an almost invisible seal.
MULTIPLE SIZES – Available in 20g and 50g plastic bottle sizes to best suit your needs.
description: From the manufacturer HOW TO APPLY? Before application materials should be stored in a warm environment to avoid chilling of the glue line, which leads to extended setting times. The surfaces to be glued should be clean, dry and free from dust, grease and other contaminants. Apply adhesive to one surface, press together for 10 sec. Cure is fast, so align carefully. This adhesive will not bridge gaps. Do not use in applications involving constant water immersion. YOUR FAVORITE OBJECTS, GLUED IN SECONDS BOND QUICKLY, REPAIR STRONGLY, WITH CONFIDENCE The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup.
